name: tv.tootie/yarr-mcp
title: Yarr MCP
description: MCP server for querying and automating a configured media automation fleet.

environmentVariables.name: YARR_SERVICES
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated configured service names, for example sonarr,radarr,prowlarr,plex.

environmentVariables.name: YARR_SONARR_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for Sonarr when sonarr is listed in YARR_SERVICES.

environmentVariables.name: YARR_RADARR_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for Radarr when radarr is listed in YARR_SERVICES.

environmentVariables.name: YARR_MCP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token required by non-loopback MCP HTTP endpoints.
